title: Defence Secretary speech on threats to the UK

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
In a recent speech, Defence Secretary acknowledged the significant threats facing the UK, particularly highlighting the presence of the Russian spy ship Yantar in UK waters. The ship was reportedly in the area from 5 to 11 November, raising concerns over national security.

The Defence Secretary's remarks coincide with heightened tensions in the region, underscoring the importance of vigilance in protecting the UK's maritime borders. This call for awareness resonates in a country with a rich aviation and naval heritage, illustrating the ongoing relevance of security measures across its coastal and airspace regions.
